content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be rearchitected to tier curiosity signals from intrinsic reward models (ICM and RND) directly into episodic memory storage: only encounters that trigger high intrinsic curiosity are prioritized for long-term retention, while low-curiosity predictable observations are pruned immediately to avoid memory bloat. This creates a self-optimizing memory pipeline that aligns what the agent actively learns with what it stores for future downstream planning.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
